title: Original Satya Nag Champa Patchouli Incense Sticks | with M&J incense sticks holder | x4 pack | for Aromatherapy, Spa, Yoga, Weddings, Meditation, Healing, Positivity and Relaxation
features: arthy and powerful, the Patchouli flora incense keeps insects and harmful germs away and acts as an excellent laundry freshener as well as grounding the user.
Satya Incense Sticks can be used for Aromatherapy, Spa, Yoga, Weddings, Meditation, Healing, Positivity and Relaxation

Satya Nag Champa Incense is made of ethically sourced quality raw materials and is traditionally hand rolled . The Ingredients used are free from metals & harmful chemicals which are safe for mixing and hand-rolling .
The pack contains 4 packs of Satya Patchouli incense sticks comes with M&J incense sticks holder
description: Product Description Hand Rolled Incense Sticks Incense is a substance that's burned to produce a fragrant scent. For many people, when they think of incense, this is what comes to mind. We offer a wide variety of their most popular scents. All of these are hand rolled Masala based incenses. Incense is used for aesthetic reasons, religious worship, aromatherapy, meditation, and ceremony. It may also be used as a simple deodorant or insect repellent Uses of incense sticks Aromatherpay Burning incense has become a key part of aromatherapy . Yoga Lighting an incense during yoga sessions helps you create the right atmosphere for your body and mind. While performing such natural activity, you would always want to avoid anything artificial and toxic and create a serene atmosphere that helps your focus. Meditation Incense is used widely in many religious practices to deepen attention, heighten senses and uplift one's own spirit when practicing meditation. Positivity & Relaxation Burning incense is a popular relaxation method, and each fragrance has different uses and positive effects on your state of mind.
